# Daily Report ‚Äî 2026-05-12

## Task Completed
Added `upload_attachment` tool ‚Äî multipart binary upload to `/api/now/attachment/file`.
Accepts `table_name`, `table_sys_id`, `file_name`, `file_content_base64` (base64-encoded
bytes), optional `content_type` (MIME type, default `application/octet-stream`), and
optional `encryption_context`. Decodes base64 locally, POSTs raw bytes with the correct
`Content-Type` header, and returns formatted attachment metadata on success.
Registered in `system_administrator` and `full` packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1029
- New tests: 15 (upload_attachment coverage: success path, URL/method, query params,
  encryption_context present/absent, content-type header, default content-type,
  raw bytes body, invalid base64, all four missing-required-field cases,
  request error, HTTP 403 error)
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level packages (pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, wheel) have known CVEs ‚Äî not in
project dependencies. Project code is clean.
